phase_name: SQLite Runtime Cleanup — Remove SQLite Driver Files
author: builder
summary: Removed SQLite runtime driver files (db.bun.ts, db.node.ts) and migrated all database initialization to the adapter pattern through db.pg.ts.

files_deleted.purpose: Bun SQLite driver — replaced by db.pg.ts with adapter abstraction
Node.js SQLite driver (better-sqlite3) — replaced by db.pg.ts with adapter abstraction
JSON schema migration — functionality absorbed into data-migration.pg.sql.ts and pg DDL

import_alias_update.new: #db points to db.pg.ts (Postgres via PGlite or pg Pool)

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: SQLite driver files removed from source tree
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: db.bun.ts, db.node.ts, json-migration.ts deleted from src/storage/

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: Database initialization routes through postgres path only
No stale imports remain referencing deleted files
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: All references to db.bun.ts, db.node.ts updated to db.pg.ts
Typecheck passes (pre-existing errors unchanged) after driver file removal

results: SQLite runtime drivers fully removed. Database initialization centralized in db.pg.ts with Postgres as the canonical write path. #db alias updated in package.json imports field. Typecheck shows no new errors from file deletion.
